a:r.a:t: झाड़ियों के उदाहरण (फूलों वाली बनाम पत्तियों वाली)
Use shrubs as middle layer between trees and ground cover
Combine flowering and foliage shrubs for visual interest
Select shrubs with different blooming periods
Shrubs are versatile plants that can be used for hedges, borders, or as standalone features. Foliage shrubs like Croton provide color even when not flowering.
